title: Mahabhairav Temple
tagline: Mahabhairav Temple — spiritual town of Assam

overview.short: Mahabhairav Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva.
overview.description: Mahabhairav Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva. It is located at a hillock on the northern part of Tezpur town in Assam, India. It is said that king Bana built this Shiva temple and originally it was built of stone but the present one was renovated and built with concrete. During the Ahom rule, the kings especially of the Tungkhungia dynasty donated large area of Devotee land to the Temple and appointed pujaris, Paiks to look after the temple.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Tezpur
topPlaces.description: Tezpur (Assamese: [tɛz.pʊɹ]) is a city in Sonitpur district, Assam state, India. Tezpur is located on the banks of the river Brahmaputra, 175 kilometres (109 mi) northeast of Guwahati, and is the largest of the north bank cities.

topPlaces.name: Tezpur Central Jail
topPlaces.description: Tezpur Central Jail is a prison located in the Sonitpur district of Assam, India. It is one of 31 prisons located in the state of Assam.

topPlaces.name: Diocese of Tezpur
topPlaces.description: Diocese of Tezpur is a Roman Catholic diocese that has its seat in Tezpur, which is in Assam, India. It was founded in 1964.

topPlaces.name: Agnigarh
topPlaces.description: Agnigarh (Pron:/ægɪˈgɑː/) is a hillock located in Tezpur, Assam, India. In Hindu scriptures, it is the site of the fortress which was built by Banasura to keep his daughter Usha in isolation.

topPlaces.name: Ketakeshwar Dewal
topPlaces.description: Ketakeshwar Dewal (shrine) is a holy site in the Ketakibari area of Tezpur in Assam, India. It is reputed to have one of the largest Shivalingas in the world.

topPlaces.name: Defence Research Laboratory
topPlaces.description: The Defence Research Laboratory (DRL) is a defence laboratory of the Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO) located in Tezpur city of Assam state of India. It conducts research and development studies on vector-borne diseases, improving the quality of drinking water, waste biodegradation and management.

topPlaces.name: Bhairabi Temple
topPlaces.description: The Bhairabi Temple is located on the outskirts of Tezpur of Sonitpur District in Assam, India.

topPlaces.name: Kumar Gaon
topPlaces.description: Kumar Gaon is a village in Tezpur Block, Sonitpur district of Assam state in India. Kumar Gaon population in 2022 is estimated to be approx 1,247.

items.note: Tezpur (Assamese: [tɛz.pʊɹ]) is a city in Sonitpur district, Assam state, India. Tezpur is located on the banks of the river Brahmaputra, 175 kilometres (109 mi) northeast of Guwahati, and is the largest of the north bank cities.
Tezpur Central Jail is a prison located in the Sonitpur district of Assam, India. It is one of 31 prisons located in the state of Assam.
Diocese of Tezpur is a Roman Catholic diocese that has its seat in Tezpur, which is in Assam, India. It was founded in 1964.
Agnigarh (Pron:/ægɪˈgɑː/) is a hillock located in Tezpur, Assam, India. In Hindu scriptures, it is the site of the fortress which was built by Banasura to keep his daughter Usha in isolation.
Ketakeshwar Dewal (shrine) is a holy site in the Ketakibari area of Tezpur in Assam, India. It is reputed to have one of the largest Shivalingas in the world.

The Defence Research Laboratory (DRL) is a defence laboratory of the Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO) located in Tezpur city of Assam state of India. It conducts research and development studies on vector-borne diseases, improving the quality of drinking water, waste biodegradation and management.
The Bhairabi Temple is located on the outskirts of Tezpur of Sonitpur District in Assam, India.
Kumar Gaon is a village in Tezpur Block, Sonitpur district of Assam state in India. Kumar Gaon population in 2022 is estimated to be approx 1,247.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mahabhairav Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mahabhairav Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mahabhairav Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Dimapur Airport (128 km) and the nearest railway station is Guwahati Railway Station (116 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mahabhairav Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mahabhairav Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mahabhairav Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Mahabhairav Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mahabhairav Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Tezpur, Tezpur Central Jail, Diocese of Tezpur, Agnigarh, Ketakeshwar Dewal.
